name: Genprex, Inc.
business: Genprex is a clinical stage gene therapy company developing gene-based therapies for lung cancer (NSCLC and SCLC) and diabetes (Type 1 and Type 2). Its lead oncology candidate, REQORSA, uses a non-viral ONCOPREX Delivery System to deliver tumor suppressor genes and is being tested in combination with approved drugs. The diabetes program, GPX-002, uses an AAV vector to deliver Pdx1 and MafA genes to the pancreas via endoscopic procedure.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage gene therapy company pioneering the development of gene-based therapies for large patient populations with unmet medical needs.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment of first 19 patients for interim analysis in Phase 2a expansion portion of Acclaim-1
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the enrollment of the first 19 patients for interim analysis in the Phase 2a expansion portion of the study in the first half of 2026 and expect the interim analysis in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Interim analysis for Phase 2a expansion portion of Acclaim-1
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the enrollment of the first 19 patients for interim analysis in the Phase 2a expansion portion of the study in the first half of 2026 and expect the interim analysis in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment of first 25 patients for interim analysis in Phase 2 expansion portion of Acclaim-3
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment of the first 25 patients for interim analysis in the Phase 2 expansion portion of the study in the first half of 2026 and expect the interim analysis in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Interim analysis for Phase 2 expansion portion of Acclaim-3
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment of the first 25 patients for interim analysis in the Phase 2 expansion portion of the study in the first half of 2026 and expect the interim analysis in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA meeting to discuss IND-enabling preclinical studies for Type 1 diabetes gene therapy
catalysts.sentence: On February 19, 2026, we met with the FDA and received feedback which aligned with our expectations and plans.

tamClaims.claim: In 2026, lung cancer will account for about 229,000 new cases and 124,000 deaths in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., according to the American Cancer Society, it is estimated that in 2026 there will be more than 229,000 new cases of lung cancer and more than 124,000 deaths from this disease.

tamClaims.claim: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer deaths worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Health Organization's 2025 cancer facts, lung cancer was the leading cause of cancer deaths worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: SCLC represents about 13% of lung cancer patients and the five-year survival rate for SCLC with distant spread is 4%.
tamClaims.sentence: SCLC represents about 13% of lung cancer patients and the five-year survival rate for patients with SCLC with distant spread is 4%.
